items.title: Ronaldinho's Fantastic Free Kick Joins Top World Cup Moments List
items.summary: The World Cup is defined by memorable moments. Counting down to the top 100 of all-time.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Sarfaraz named head coach as Pakistan name four newbies for Bangladesh Tests
items.summary: Abdullah Fazal, Amad Butt, Azan Awais, and Ghazi Ghori are the new faces in Pakistan's Test squad; Asad Shafiq (batting coach) and Umar Gul (bowling coach) join the back room
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Hunger and desire the 'vitamin' for Arsenal fans' tension
items.summary: Arsenal were booed off after their Premier League defeat by Bournemouth - and boss Mikel Arteta will not want tension to seep on to the pitch against Manchester City.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.
